TASK.OBJECTIVE: Identify the single most important problem in the changed code and provide exactly one concrete corrective action.

RULE.REQUIREMENT: Architecture violations must be addressed before any local or stylistic issues.
RULE.PROHIBITION: Local refactors are invalid when architecture rules are violated.

ACTION_CONSTRAINTS.CONSTRAINT: The action must be one of the allowed actions.
The action must mention the destination layer.
The action must mention a concrete function or file name.
Do not suggest local fixes if architecture rules are violated.

ACTION_RULES.RULE: Do not use internal action names.
Write the action as a direct instruction to a developer.
Mention the function or code shown in the snippet.

OUTPUT_CONTRACT.STRUCTURE: ISSUE: <one precise sentence> ACTION: <one concrete refactoring or move>
